title: The Crazy Science of Ice Cream Overload!

scenes.text: Did you know that ice cream can be a science experiment? It can lower your body temperature when consumed in large amounts!
scenes.query2: the effects of excessive ice cream
scenes.fact: In extreme cases, consuming over 3 gallons of ice cream can cause hypothermia.

scenes.text: The average American consumes about 23 pounds of ice cream per year!
scenes.fact: That's nearly 48 pints of pure delight!

scenes.text: But here's the twist: Eating cold foods doesn't actually cool you down!
scenes.query2: do cold foods lower body temperature

scenes.text: Hit follow for your daily dose of wow.
scenes.cta: Follow us for more amazing discoveries!

description: Ice cream is not just a delicious treat, but it also holds secrets about your body and temperature! Follow for more mind-blowing facts!
